# Weigh Anchor

> Enterprise construction project management and business automation for organizations ready to digitize and scale.

## About

Weigh Anchor is a veteran-owned firm based in Bellevue, WA that provides two core services: construction project management and business process automation. We serve federal agencies, tribal nations, and private sector organizations across 17 U.S. states and territories — and we're expanding access to small and mid-size businesses through productized service packages.

Founded by a U.S. Air Force Civil Engineering veteran. SDVOSB certified.

## Services

### Construction Project Management
- Project Management: Full lifecycle oversight from procurement through closeout
- Project Controls: Budget tracking, schedule forecasting, change order management
- Program Management: Standardized reporting, resource allocation, risk management across portfolios
- Field Operations: Site inspections, quality assurance, contractor oversight

### Business Automation
- Process Mapping & Improvement: Documenting how work actually flows and identifying bottlenecks
- Automation & Digitization: Converting paper forms, manual handoffs, and spreadsheets into automated systems
- AI Implementation: Document processing, automated reporting, intelligent workflows deployed into operations
- Ongoing Support & Training: Team training on every system built, with continued maintenance and evolution

## Who We Serve
- Federal agencies (Department of Justice, Department of Veterans Affairs)
- Tribal nations (40+ across 17 states)
- Private sector organizations (Pfizer, construction firms, real estate companies)
- Small and mid-size businesses ready to modernize operations
